stemHtml: The continuous ignition mode of a gas turbine engine is a…

options.a: low-energy-level ignition used when there is an increased risk of a flame-out.
options.b: low-energy-level ignition used for in-flight re-starts.
options.c: high-energy-level ignition used at engine start.
options.d: high-energy-level ignition used during all engine operating modes.
